title: Untitled
content:
---
updated: 2026-04-08 - merged Obsidian call notes (1,584 lines) from `Obsidian/Business/Local SEO/Clients-Current/Elite movers.md`
---

Client Overview: Elite Movers & Storage
Business Overview
Elite Movers & Storage is a moving company based in Ventura, California. They offer a wide range of services including local residential moves, long-distance moving, commercial relocations, specialty item handling (e.g., pianos, antiques, electronics), and short/long-term storage. The company has been actively expanding its footprint and recently opened a new storage facility. They emphasize professionalism, careful item handling, and efficient full-service moves.
Key Contact
Name: Rudy
Role: Owner
DISC Profile: D (Dominant) - prefers direct, to-the-point communication and quick results.
SEO & Marketing Info
Elite Movers partnered with Online Optimisers for SEO, Google Ads, and local content marketing. The company saw a 130%+ increase in revenue within 8 months, largely due to high-impact project pages, local SEO work, and video-driven email outreach. They are currently using the Local Wizz WordPress plugin to manage geo-specific project pages. Main keywords are: residential movers, pod load, moving containers, piano movers, antique movers, long-distance movers, commercial movers, etc.
Technology & Tools
• WordPress site with Local Wizz plugin
• RankMath for SEO optimization
• Google Ads: previously managed from agency account, no access confirmed from client's own Google Ads
• Email campaigns use Loom videos
• Form fill alerts and potential GHL integration pending
• Exploring call tracking and CRM setup via GHL (GoHighLevel) with missed call automation
Pain Points & Challenges
• Rudy misses some phone calls and has no automated follow-up system in place.
• Interested in setting up a CRM (e.g., GHL) but wants to retain his current phone number.
• Managing leads across email and calls is inconsistent—potential to lose follow-ups.
• Web dev team exploring sticky desktop call-to-action features to encourage more calls.
Content Development
• 11+ Local Wizz project pages created with geo-focused keywords
• Full SOP in place for future pages
• Image descriptions, SEO slugs, meta titles/descriptions provided per page
• GMB posts in place (e.g., full-service packing testimonial posts)
• Keywords and categories carefully chosen and organized

---

title: Obsidian Call History Merge (2026-04-08)
content:
### Contact

- **Main phone:** (805) 697-6220
- **Old GHL number:** 904-740-2883 (deprecated)
- **Address:** Ventura + Santa Barbara CA (expanding to Lake Forest CA planned)


### Access credentials (MOVE TO PASSWORD MANAGER - DO NOT LEAVE HERE)

**SECURITY FLAG:** The following were found in Obsidian as plaintext. They need to be migrated to a password manager and removed from Obsidian/OneDrive-synced files:
- Elite Movers login (`info@onlineoptimisers.net` / `Info@2025`)
- 2nd login (`elitemoversca@gmail.com` / `Elite@2025`)
- **Exposed ChatGPT API key** (starts with `sk-UuGy0q...`) - ROTATE IMMEDIATELY even if "expired"
- LocalWizz App WordPress user credentials


### Timeline of calls and key decisions

**July 2024 - Rudy Call 24/07/24 (first captured call)**
- Storage: 65% full, will be 100% by end of week
- 11 x 5000 unit storage
- Can expand

**August 2024 - Rudy Call 23/08/24**
- Drop-down menus for counties: Santa Barbara (Montecito), Ventura
- Phone number has missing 0
- Forklift pictures in storage
- Elite packing: add "full pack move" as a research item
- Payment options: cheque, Zelle, credit card (2.8% charge), ACH wire, debit card
- Fleet photography discussion - multiple angle pictures
- Pictures inventory: ~80 photos counted
- GMB competitors: "attention to detail moving", "unique movers"
- Oxnard GMB - real one, franchise question

**September 2024 - Call 20/09/24**
- Shut down Yelp
- YouTube video plans
- Real estate guys as target
- Rudy ranks top 10 in California
- Target market: 80% of jobs booked through women ("sex sells")
- Montecito pictures usage
- Positioning: "Old movers he is destroying them now"

**October 2024 - Rudy Call 09/10/24**
- Apartment strategy: business cards, flyers with QR code posters
- Referrals / service area guys
- Customer insight: kids are moving, not parents
- Rack cards, flyer cards
- "Pillar of the company - 10% off"
- Slow season ads
- Storage: losing money soon

**November 2024 - Rudy Call 06/11/24**
- Yelp picture (static) - take out negative reviews
- Google carousel
- Storage focus
- GMB posting cadence
- Icons missing on some pages
- Wants more GMB post videos

**February 2025 - Impromptu Rudy Call 14/02/25**
- "Joint venture, no strings attached"
- Quote: "I'm happy to say your Google Goose. On the back on, know that. What I'm asking, if I keep you guys the priority."
- "Purposes: send me who I want, from one business man to another. Let me know, ahead of time, happy to talk to them."
- "Keep Rudy top of mind"
- Next door storage: open, fill in next 2-3 months
- $500 Google ads (set aside for storage)
- Switch Craigslist to storage focus
- Call summary: very enthusiastic, just be his guy, wasn't sure if he was asking for something, "let's fucking help this dude rock"

**March 2025 - Rudy Call 05/03/25**
- OO confusion with ads: appearing 3x for storage, confused for "extra space storage", people thought Rudy was U-Haul
- Icon needed to make clear he's also a moving company
- Storage location change needed: Ventura to Oxnard
- West Lake and Thousand Oaks target (wealthy houses)
- Renting the house: Camarillo or Thousand Oaks
- Gets a lot of mail about moving
- New GMB planned: Oxnard

**April 2025 - Rudy Call (approx 5th)**
- Combined gross: $250k
- Target areas: Montecito, West Lake, Santa Barbara, Thousand Oaks
- Can adjust to $150k/year
- **Website rebuild brief:** Meatheadmovers style reference
  - Functionality, button layout
  - Black and silver color scheme
  - Timeless, clean, modern
  - Flows like Meatheads, sections on top bar
  - "Ours more serious, chic sex appeal, we're more sophisticated"
  - "Accomplished, different level here"
  - "Convey that through our image"
  - "Needs the next level to the website"
  - TV installation mentioned
  - Build on staging link first
  - **Willing to spend $5k**
- Silver and black confirmed as colors

**April 2025 - Elite Movers Call 18/04/25**
- Address context: warehouse address used 8-9 years ago (invoices, biz license)
- Ranking #1 overall in downtown - he's happy
- **"Was paying $5k/month" for previous agency**
- **"I don't have complaints for $1,750"** (Rudy quote on current retainer)
- Retirement homes as target market

**June 2025 - Rudy Call 16/06/25**
- Pictures and videos production needed
- Getting new truck - new specs on website
- 3x fleet liners
- Color: silver instead of white
- Taglines discussed:
  - "Smooth is fast, experience is King"
  - "Experience is the best teacher"
- Hover effects on these
- CTA section top
- 2x emblems (Google + Yelp) with shadow "popping off the page"

**July 2025 - Rudy Call 23/07/25**
- Since last call (1.5 weeks ago):
  - New manager found a lot of pages with SEO removed by previous manager (who was fired)
  - Traffic is up last month (Ahrefs)
  - GSC clicks up
  - GSC unauthorized email question (sitemap was updated, not by OO)
- Website: hosting close to getting it live
- Phone number: cannot track calls or do automations without GHL number
- Can change to Oxnard number
- New logo: change?
- Phone change back to Rudy's main right now
- **PR firms or awards for local businesses** (strategy item)
- 2x audits mentioned: Augusta + welding
- PR firms, design custom homes, awards

**September 2025 - Rudy Check-in 19/09/25 (website rebuild)**
- Change content right away
- Meathead wording to change (don't want to copy directly)
- Kill student athletes content
- **Punch words discussed:**
  - "We're technical, experienced, smooth is fast"
  - Bottom line: technically superior, professional
  - "We do not hire 1-2 guys with experience and 4-5 kids/day laborers"
  - "All Rudy's guys know what to do, every guy is trained and working in unison, formed this way on purpose"
  - "3 guys fumbling around and 1 guy running them" (competitor framing)
- **Premium positioning:**
  - Focus on big buildings, art, allied art
  - Museum-quality crating
  - Cotton gloves, glycine paper (acid-free)
  - "Why we charge more"
  - "This is our profession, not a seasonal thing"
- Video needs:
  - Video on packing their own house
  - Promo video
  - 5-6 movers on a day, every day, 5 jobs
  - 6 on 1 job and 4 on 1 job
  - Quarterbacking a move - army-managed
- **Credentials:** Moved $25M houses, $100-200k art pieces, millions in art
- **Videographer:** North LA to find someone for Rudy
- 1 main awesome video on homepage: slow-mo, dollies coming out, mansion job
- Meeting time: 8:30am Tuesday Rudy time

**September 2025 - Rudy Call 23/09/25**
- Happy to get Hostinger account

**October 2025 - Rudy Call 16/10/25 (new hosting setup)**
- Clicked "add website" for Elite Movers?
- New WordPress password saved?
- Revenue up
- Lots of spam
- Art calls - specialized equipment
- Local Wizz art pages
- Commercial moving: hospital jobs, Goodwill jobs

**November 2025 - Rudy Dialpad call ~21 Nov**
- Bitcoin / Tao discussion
- Pods, other services, art, materials
- Multiple pictures across service pages
- Elite truck fleet prominence
- "How we load"
- Hot tubs, special equipment
- Missed calls automation
- SMS

**November 2025 - 27/11/25**
- Rudy not getting notifications on Gmail phone (fixed)
- Photos ready - gallery will be huge
- Videos coming next
- **Competitor issue: Max Protection Solutions**
  - FBI job bidding over them
  - Under-bidding him
  - Described as "rag tag company"
- 10 workers now
- Google Ads guy situation
- Logos + move main stuff quickly (logo, icons)

**December 2025 - Rudy Call 02/12/25**
- **Mama Boy Movers competitor issue:**
  - On Rudy's Google address (on Yelp)
  - BBB issue
  - "Suggest an edit" via Google local guides to move address to San Diego or report them
  - Google Maps = 100% on Mama Boy's address (dispute)
- Form/Number strategy: keep hidden, pop-up of Rudy "Speak to Rudy now"
- **Simon (Google Ads) situation:**
  - Claimed Rudy was overpaying for too many clicks
  - Said "I'm your new manager"
  - Google Ads was "better than it ever was"
  - Rudy: "I'm good, I don't want to fix something that's not broken"
  - Rudy didn't change anything
  - Budget: $3,500
  - Google Meets then Rudy changed some stuff
  - Rudy needs to call Simon today
  - Simon claims software is outdated
- Pop-up deployment decision

**February 2026 - Rudy Call 10/02/26**
- Rankings: website okay-ish
- **GMB rankings falling** (FLAG)
- Rank drop investigation
- **Branding mismatch:** "Elite Movers & Storage" vs "Elite Movers & Packing Services"
- New competitor with more reviews - do a reputation management campaign
- New GreenGeeks access (temporary, migrating to Hostinger)
- Website: duplicate content issue, overall structure issues, design features not integrating well
- Fixes made but indexing slower than usual (Google side)
- Rebuild: show new design
- Ads? Simon questions
- AI mentioned
- **Address still showing old one** as of Feb 2026 (despite verification attempts, citations would need changing)
- AI rankings: "this is big news"
- Payment page: most companies have hidden fees, disclaimer needed
- 3x4 gallery section
- GMB Performance check 28/01/26

**February 2026 - Rudy Call 20/02/26**
- 10-15% is both storage and moving split
- Managing his not good cuts Rudy out, otherwise still wants a cut
- Management vs leads-only decision pending
- Google + Yelp on the cards
- Less mentioning of "go-convert" - has to go through Online Optimisers money-wise
- Summer pattern: $4.5k/month drops to $1.5-2k when very busy (organic working well)


### Storage expansion - Lake Forest CA

- New GMB planned
- Location page needed
- Warehouse purchase consideration
- Google Maps link: https://maps.app.goo.gl/ohKgFFRt9swL9BTj9


### Competitors identified
- Max Protection Solutions (price undercutting)
- Mama Boys Movers (GMB address dispute)
- Little Guys Movers (review count race - now passed by Bobcat, not Elite)
- Unspecified: "attention to detail moving", "unique movers"


### Services and credentials specifics

- **Fleet:** 3x fleet liners, new truck coming with custom specs
- **Team:** 10 workers as of Nov 2025
- **Storage units:** 11 x 5000 sq ft
- **Specialty:** Museum-quality art crating, hot tubs, pianos, antiques, hospital moves, commercial

- "Smooth is fast, experience is King"
- "I can't hire you unless you have a storage facility"
- "For $1,750 I don't have complaints"

### Strategic content ideas (discussed, not all actioned)
